'''Reactant agitator injectors''' were components used on [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] such as [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation's]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]]. [[Sarylcorp]] manufactured "closed loop" reactant agitator injectors that collected fission byproduct from the catalyst injected into the fighter's [[Power converter/Legends|power converter]]. The byproduct was then agitated and thermo-chemically reconverted the material into the catalyst.<ref name="SWS" />
